## Reference

<!-- Title, author, year, and a link or citation if available -->

## Evidence type
<!-- Academic study, historical case, pilot result, legal precedent, operational system, failure case, audit/report, lived-experience evidence -->

## Relevant section or claim

<!-- Which claim-register row, roadmap phase, article, founding-order rule, annex, patch (P-XXX), or threat (T-XXX) does this apply to? -->

## What the analogue shows

<!-- What does this case demonstrate? Does it support, challenge, or complicate the current design? -->

## Evidence quality
<!-- What are the limits? Sample size, jurisdiction, time period, selection bias, missing data, contested interpretation? -->

## Implications for the protocol

<!-- Does this suggest a gap, a validation, or a refinement? -->

## Suggested register update
<!-- Should this update docs/Claims_Evidence_Register.md, docs/Pilot_Evidence_Roadmap.md, or both? -->
